CustomField.description: This is the legal name of the product for use when being sent to distressed
CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, "Core Walmart Rewards Mastercard"), "Walmart Mastercard", TEXT(Account_Type__c) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the legal name of the product for use when being sent to distressed
CustomField.label: Legal Product Type
